tasks.title: ## Task: Implement boundary-skip + adv-task manifest fix (TDD)
tasks.summary: Aligned `adv-task.scope.gates` with its fast-track command contract, exported and clarified `validateGateBoundary`, added explicit `user`/`user:*` actor bypass before manifest scanning, documented `completedBy` convention, and added focused tests for manifest ownership, user actor skips, authorized command pass, unauthorized command warning, and adv-task proposal gate pass. RED targeted test failed on the adv-task cases; GREEN targeted test passed.
tasks.implementation_summary: Aligned `adv-task.scope.gates` with its fast-track command contract, exported and clarified `validateGateBoundary`, added explicit `user`/`user:*` actor bypass before manifest scanning, documented `completedBy` convention, and added focused tests for manifest ownership, user actor skips, authorized command pass, unauthorized command warning, and adv-task proposal gate pass. RED targeted test failed on the adv-task cases; GREEN targeted test passed.

tasks.title: ## Task: Full verification — `pnpm run check` + full test suite
tasks.verification: Completed with clean checkpoint; no new commit needed after verification.
tasks.summary: Verified change end-to-end. `pnpm run check` passed (typecheck + isolation check + lint + format:check). `pnpm test` passed (151 files, 1815 tests, 2 skipped). Worktree remained clean after verification.
tasks.implementation_summary: Verified change end-to-end. `pnpm run check` passed (typecheck + isolation check + lint + format:check). `pnpm test` passed (151 files, 1815 tests, 2 skipped). Worktree remained clean after verification.

design.approval_evidence: Design validated by adv-researcher. Verdict: CAUTION → recommendations adopted. Two distinct false-positive sources identified: (A) user-driven completions, (B) adv-task manifest under-declaration. Both fixed in this change. userApproved overload rejected per validator. Skip placed before manifest scan.

planning.approval_evidence: User approved prep contract by replying `continue` after the task graph was presented. Proceeding to apply inline per post-approval auto-continue.

execution.approval_evidence: All tasks completed. Implementation checkpoint commit 6f87ca757599190b7df9b6018128d849f6ffac35. Verification task passed `pnpm run check` and `pnpm test`; worktree clean.

acceptance.approval_evidence: User accepted delivered #8 implementation by replying `accept`. Review findings: no blockers, issues, suggestions, or questions. Verification passed: targeted gate tests, `pnpm run check`, full `pnpm test`.

release.approval_evidence: Archive sign-off received via exact Tier B whitelist reply `sign off`. Validation passed with warnings only (NO_DELTAS + proposal drift warnings; no spec deltas expected for internal tooling fix). Verification passed before sign-off: `pnpm run check` and `pnpm test`.

clarify_findings.message: Proposal references authentication/authorization without specifying the model. What auth mechanism will be used?
